---
title: "Lecture 17: Week 4 Review"
date: 2026-07-13
summary: "Week 4 Review and Q&A"
url_slides:
url_code:
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Info and Materials

* **Date**: {{< meta date >}}
* **Topics**: {{< meta summary >}}
* **Slides**: No slides for this session
* **Code**: No in-class code for this session

<!--
* **Slides**: [View Slides]({{< meta url_slides >}})
* **Code**: `usethis::use_course("{{< meta url_code >}}")`
-->

## Learning Objectives

Today, we will review the following topics and answer any questions you may have:

- Quiz 4 answers
- Week 4 course content
- Homework Assignment

Today and throughout this week, we will continue with the in-class oral checks. I will share a sign-up sheet and more details ahead of time.


## Before Class

- Complete Quiz 4
- Bring any questions you have about the Week 4 materials!
